_comment: Canonical example for the AFFECTED_CONTRACTS block emitted by the solution-architect inside outputs/phase-2-architecture.md. Per-repo entries with affected files and their additive/breaking classification. The JSON is the source of truth — downstream phases extract it via scripts/extract-block.js (or read outputs/blocks/affected-contracts.json after split-design.js runs). Phase 3a (contract edit) dispatches schema-implementer per repo in `edit_order` and refuses `classification: breaking` unless `breaking_changes_authorized` is `true`. The task-planner reads this block to resolve event schema file paths for no-api workers. Full schema change content (Avro field definitions, JSON Schema $refs, Protobuf field numbers) lives in the CONTRACT_DESIGN prose — this block carries the navigable index. Field reference and consumer list live in block-schemas.md. Strip the _comment field from real output.

contracts.rationale: Order shipped event needs a carrier field so downstream observers can route by carrier

files.summary: New event type — no existing consumers

contracts.rationale: Order events reference the shared OrderRef schema from data-schemas

files.summary: Pick up new `carrier` field via the OrderRef $ref
